zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Ponthieu於1182年出生在法國皮卡迪奧易阿別維爾-賽吉盧希時，她的父親Jean Ier de Ponthieu41歲，母親Beatrice St Pol28歲。她和Enguerrand de Picquigny II至少有2個女兒。她去世於1224年在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Ponthieu于1182年出生在法国皮卡迪奧易阿別維爾-賽吉盧希时，她的父亲Jean Ier de Ponthieu41岁，母亲Beatrice St Pol28岁。她和Enguerrand de Picquigny II至少有2个女儿。她去世于1224年在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Ponthieu was born in 1182, in Abbeville-Saint-Lucien, Oise, Picardie, France, her father, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, was 41 and her mother, Beatrice St Pol, was 28. She had at least 2 daughters with Enguerrand de Picquigny II. She died in 1224, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Ponthieu est née en 1182, à Abbeville-Saint-Lucien, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Beatrice St Pol, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Enguerrand de Picquigny II. Elle est décédée en 1224, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Ponthieu 1182 in Abbeville-Saint-Lucien, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean Ier de Ponthieu 41 und ihre Mutter Beatrice St Pol 28. Sie hatte mit Enguerrand de Picquigny II mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1224 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Ponthieu è nata il nel 1182 nel Abbeville-Saint-Lucien, Oise, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Beatrice St Pol, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Enguerrand de Picquigny II. Morì nel 1224, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Frévent, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフルeベント
ja.Picquigny, Amiens, Somme, Picardie, Fran: フランスピカーディソンメピククイグニー
ja.Abbeville, Oise, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディオイゼアベヴィレ-サイント-ルシン
ja.Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメピククイグニー
ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Ponthieuが1182年にフランスピカーディオイゼアベヴィレ-サイント-ルシンで生まれた時，父Jean Ier de Ponthieuは41歳，母Beatrice St Polは28歳であった。彼女はEnguerrand de Picquigny IIとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1224年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Ponthieu(이)가 1182년 프랑스 피카디 이스 애브베비레-세인트-루시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean Ier de Ponthieu(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice St Pol(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Enguerrand de Picquigny II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Ponthieu nasceu em 1182, em Abbeville-Saint-Lucien, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice St Pol, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Enguerrand de Picquigny II. Ela faleceu em 1224, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Ponthieu родилась в 1182 г. в местности эббевилле-сеинт-люсиен, оис, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean Ier de Ponthieu было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrice St Pol, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Enguerrand de Picquigny II. Она умерла в 1224 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Ponthieu nació en 1182, en Abbeville-Saint-Lucien, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Jean Ier de Ponthieu, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Beatrice St Pol, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Enguerrand de Picquigny II. Murió en 1224, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
